text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
You know, when you come up against 
a big wall, I think it's perfectly fine to 
run away at first.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
It's not about getting there the fastest! When 
you're on the scenic route, there's no telling
what cool ideas will pop into your head!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
So anyway, I've been running away for three
days now, but I still can't think of a way out!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Seriously, what am I gonna do 
about tomorrow's quiz?!
